name: ops-agent-evaluator
description: CSA Loom Operations Agent evaluator — timer-triggered Azure Function (G3). On a cron it reads operations-agent items from Cosmos, evaluates each trigger's KQL against the bound Eventhouse (ADX), reasons over a fired condition with Azure OpenAI, and dispatches the approval Logic App (Teams adaptive card) or the autonomous action. Azure-native, no Microsoft Fabric / Power Automate dependency.
